infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: Red String uses your camera to add photo evidence to investigations.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: Red String accesses your photo library to add image evidence to investigations.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: Red String uses your microphone for voice input and live broadcasts.
infoPlist.NSFaceIDUsageDescription: Red String uses Face ID to protect your private investigations.
